name: Marzocchi Pompe S.p.A.
summary: Marzocchi Pompe S.p.A. engages in the design, manufacture, and sale of external gear pumps and motors in Italy and internationally. The company offers ELIKA Marzocchi pumps, micro pumps, aluminum gear motors, motors and pumps with flanges, built in valves, bearing support products, aluminum gear pumps, hi-low pumps, short pumps, modular pumps, pumps for power units, and fittings and seals kits. Its products are used in textile machines, machine tools, plastic injection machines, medical equipment, energy, mobile, and automotive, etc. The company was founded in 1949 and is based in Casalecchio di Reno, Italy.
